title: Re:Create With Essentials
description: It’s Re:Create With Essentials, designed for better compatibility with friends.
body:
# The Re:Create modpack with Essentials mod
This is the modpack with Re:Create, but with the Essentials mod for better compatibility with friends.

Re:Create is a modpack that is a fabric-based modpack is filled with content for you or you and a group of friends to explore. A Minecraft modpack that centers around the create mod. Wether you're looking to build intricate contraptions, explore automation, or simply add mechanical life to your world.

With Create, you can build anything from functional machinery to grand, moving structures like trains, windmills or even complex factories, all within the familiar Minecraft aestethic. Pair this with the countless addons available and you can create nearly anything.

# the main mods are:

- Create

- Create Steam N Rails

- Create Copycats

- A ton more Create Addons

- Amendments

- Naturalist

- Traveler's Backpack

- Stoneworks

- JEI

- A few performance mods

# The Re:Create modpack was not my idea, it came from:

> **Shalz** Owner ( i think )
> 
> **TheoMonty** Co-founder ( i also think )
